name: mobilerpa-ts-agent
description: MobileRPA 手机端 Agent TypeScript 独立工程

scripts.clean: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); require('fs').rmSync('release', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node tools/build-agent-bundle.js
scripts.release:agent: npm run check && npm run test && npm run build
